race.description: Pursehouse Rural Gunnedah Showcase Mdn Plate (C1)
race.comment: CURRUMBIN ALLEY (1) made it three minor placings in a row when he tracked the eventual winner all the way but couldn't bridge the gap over 1600m at Scone last start. Yet to be tested beyond a mile but the dam is by Savabeel so he should cope. Looks the one to beat. LOTS TO LOVE (2) stepped up to 2000m very quickly last time out and was just found wanting in the closing stages of a Kembla BM64. Won his maiden last prep over this distance. Ready to peak at the third run back. IT'S NOT OVER (7) form has dropped off in last two after a win at Tuncurry three runs back. Fitter and gets a chance to feature. FLEE WITH ME (13) finished 3 lengths from the winner in fourth at her most recent appearance over 1400m at Parkes. Worth including in this suitable contest.
